data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Enhances user account security with two-factor authentication.
data.technical_spec: Supports mobile devices and hardware tokens for two-factor verification.

data.title: Video and Comment Moderation
data.description: AI-driven systems to detect and filter inappropriate content and comments.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning algorithms analyze video content and associated metadata.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Secures data transfer and storage with encryption.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes HTTPS for data in transit and Google-managed keys for data at rest.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Mitigates distributed denial-of-service attacks with advanced defenses.
data.technical_spec: Layered protection through on-premise and cloud-based solutions.

data.title: Account Recovery Mechanisms
data.description: Provides robust solutions for account recovery post-compromise.
data.technical_spec: Automated systems to verify user identity and recover access.
